title: Vibrant Malted Egyptian Flour Dumplings
description: Malty, crumbly dumplings perfect for a sick day, made with simple flour and a touch of honey for comfort.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together white flour, malted barley flour, baking powder, and salt.
In another bowl, beat egg, milk, honey, and softened butter until smooth.
Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined; the dough will be sticky.
Turn the dough onto a floured surface and fold it over itself 3 times, then shape into 12 small dumplings.
Place dumplings onto a parchment-lined baking sheet and brush each with a little olive oil.
Bake for 12-15 minutes until golden brown and firm.
Let cool for 5 minutes before serving in a lacquerware bowl.
Serve warm with a drizzle of honey or a sprinkle of fresh herbs if desired.
